Class Event_SeedUpdate

java.lang.Object
dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.event.Event
dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.event.Event_SeedUpdate
public class Event_SeedUpdate extends Event
Represents an event for updating the random seed of a multi-sowable sampler within the simulation.

When this event occurs, the associated sampler updates its random seed. The event also logs the occurrence using Reporter.

This class extends Event and implements the happen(Simulation) method to define the behavior specific to seed update events.

See Also:
  • Event
  • IMultiSowable
  • IMultiSowable.updateSeed()

  • Constructor Details

    • Event_SeedUpdate

      public Event_SeedUpdate(IMultiSowable sampler, long time)
      Constructs a new Event_SeedUpdate.
      Parameters:
      sampler - the sampler whose seed will be updated
      time - the simulation time at which the event occurs

  • Method Details

    • happen

      public void happen(Simulation sim)
      Executes the seed update event in the simulation.

      This method first calls Event.happen(Simulation) to perform shared event bookkeeping (such as ID assignment and periodic reporting). Then it invokes IMultiSowable.updateSeed() on the associated sampler and logs the event using Reporter.addEvent(int, long, long, long, java.lang.String, int, long, java.lang.String).

      Overrides:
      happen in class Event
      Parameters:
      sim - the current simulation context
      See Also:
      • IMultiSowable.updateSeed()
